content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run an Engineering discovery session for your supplement line. New line or retrofit?
New supplement encapsulation and bottling line in our 21 CFR Part 111 registered facility.
Encapsulation at 100,000 capsules/hour. Bottling at 80 bottles/minute. 2 million capsules annually.
Compressed air, temperature-controlled room (18-22°C, RH <50%). 25x50 foot footprint available.
IQ/OQ/PQ per 21 CFR 111 analogues. Weight verification and metal detection validation required.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
